query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
        FROM messages m
        JOIN threads t ON t.id = m.thread_id
        JOIN channels c ON c.id = t.channel_id
        WHERE 1=1
          AND ($1 = '' OR $2 = 'all' OR t.channel_id = $3)
          AND ($4 = '' OR m.thread_id = $5)
          AND ($6 = '' OR $7 = 'all' OR m.role = $8)
          AND ($9 = '' OR $10 = 'all' OR t.provider = $11)
          AND ($12 = '' OR $13 = 'all' OR t.model = $14)
          AND ($15 = '' OR $16 = 'all' OR m.msg_type = ANY(string_to_array($17, ',')))
          AND ($18 != 'true' OR m.thread_sequence = 0)
          AND ($19 = '' OR m.msg_subtype LIKE $20)
